source.section: 4 - AN/ASQ-228 ATFLIR Targeting Pod > 4.7 - Air-to-Air Operation > 4.7.2 - Auto Track

steps.action: Make sure the targeting pod is powered
steps.voiced: Confirm the targeting pod is powered.

steps.action: Press the A/A Master Mode button. The RDR ATTK (radar) page will appear on the right DDI and the FLIR page will appear on the left DDI.
steps.voiced: Press the A/A Master Mode Button — RDR ATTK appears on the right DDI, FLIR on the left.

steps.action: Select FLIR by pressing the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the DDI with the FLIR page (left).
steps.voiced: Press Sensor Control Switch toward the FLIR DDI to select it.

steps.action: The Select Focus Diamond indicates what display is selected.
steps.voiced: Confirm the Select Focus Diamond appears on the FLIR DDI.

steps.action: Select BST (Boresight) mode by selecting the BST pushbutton on the FLIR page. The FLIR will be slaved to the boresight line of sight.
steps.voiced: Press the BST pushbutton on the FLIR page to select Boresight — FLIR slews to boresight.

steps.action: Press OSB next to RTCL (boxed) to display the targeting pod's reticle Sensor Control Switch AFT/FWD/LEFT/RIGHT Reticle 4 - AN/ASQ-228
steps.voiced: Press OSB next to RTCL to display the targeting pod reticle — confirm it boxes.

steps.action: Use the TDC (Throttle Designator Controller) AFT/FWD/LEFT/AFT Controls to slew the targeting pod on the target. Slewing the targeting pod will automatically disengage Boresight mode.
steps.voiced: Use TDC AFT/FWD/Left/Right to slew the pod onto target — slewing disengages Boresight automatically.

steps.action: You can zoom and choose desired FLIR/TV setting using the appropriate Option Select Buttons on the FLIR page.
steps.voiced: Use the FLIR page OSBs to zoom and select desired FLIR/TV setting.

steps.action: Press/bump the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the FLIR format page (left) to attempt to Auto Track the target.
steps.voiced: Bump Sensor Control Switch toward the FLIR page to attempt Auto Track.

steps.action: When Auto Track is obtained, a designation box will appear on the HUD and the targeting pod will track the target.
steps.voiced: Confirm Auto Track — designation box on HUD, pod actively tracks target.

steps.action: If you want to "dump" the target, press the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the DDI with the FLIR page (left).
steps.voiced: Press Sensor Control Switch toward the FLIR DDI to dump the target.
